name: Jennifer Tene
awards: Administrative Excellence Award, Communication Coordination Recognition
bio: Jennifer drives day-to-day coordination between project engineering and administrative workflows, ensuring information moves clearly and decisions happen on time. Her structure-first approach supports reliable execution, smooth handoffs, and strong communication with both internal teams and clients.
careerHighlights: Coordinates engineering and admin workflows to keep projects moving cleanly.
Maintains communication continuity across departments and client channels.
Improves handoff quality through organized documentation and tracking.
Supports mission execution with dependable follow-up and clarity.
funFact: Jennifer thrives on coordinating moving parts so every team has what it needs on time.
